channel.title: Colourity — Personal Colour Analysis & Outfit Matching
channel.description: Official blog feed for Colourity. Personal colour analysis, skin tone matching, and Indian outfit guides for sarees, kurtas, anarkalis, and men's wear.

item.title: What's My Colour Season? A Simple Undertone Test (No App Needed)
item.description: Find your colour season in 3 quick questions — undertone, depth, and clarity. No professional draping required. #Colourity #PersonalColourAnalysis #IndianFashion #OutfitMatching #DesiStyle

item.title: Warm vs Cool vs Neutral Undertone: How to Tell the Difference
item.description: A clear side-by-side comparison of warm, cool, and neutral undertones — tests, best colours, and best metals for each. #Colourity #PersonalColourAnalysis #IndianFashion #OutfitMatching #DesiStyle

item.title: The Complete Guide to Indian Skin Tones and the Colours That Suit Them
item.description: A complete, undertone-aware guide to Indian skin tones — fair, wheatish, dusky, and deep — and the colours that genuinely suit each. #Colourity #PersonalColourAnalysis #IndianFashion #OutfitMatching #DesiStyle

item.title: Which Colour Suits You for Diwali? A Guide by Skin Tone
item.description: Choosing your Diwali outfit colour? Here's what actually suits your undertone and skin tone — not just what's trending this year. #Colourity #PersonalColourAnalysis #IndianFashion #OutfitMatching #DesiStyle

item.title: Bridal Lehenga Colours by Skin Tone: What Actually Suits You
item.description: Not every red suits every bride. A practical, undertone-based guide to choosing your bridal lehenga colour. #Colourity #PersonalColourAnalysis #IndianFashion #OutfitMatching #DesiStyle

item.title: Office Wear Colours That Actually Suit You (Not Just Boring Black and Navy)
item.description: Professional doesn't have to mean black and navy on repeat. Here's how to build a work wardrobe in colours that actually match your undertone. #Colourity #PersonalColourAnalysis #IndianFashion #OutfitMatching #DesiStyle

item.title: Which Kurta Colours Suit Your Skin Tone? A Practical Guide
item.description: From everyday cotton kurtas to festive silk ones — here's how to pick kurta colours that actually suit your skin tone. #Colourity #PersonalColourAnalysis #IndianFashion #OutfitMatching #DesiStyle

item.title: Does Pantone's 2026 Colour of the Year (Cloud Dancer) Suit Your Skin Tone?
item.description: Pantone named Cloud Dancer, a soft white, its 2026 Colour of the Year. Here's whether it actually suits your skin tone — and how to wear it if it doesn't. #Colourity #PersonalColourAnalysis #IndianFashion #OutfitMatching #DesiStyle

item.title: Is Colour Analysis Actually Legit, or Just a TikTok Trend?
item.description: Colour analysis blew up on TikTok, but is the science behind it real? An honest look at what's proven and what's hype. #Colourity #PersonalColourAnalysis #IndianFashion #OutfitMatching #DesiStyle

item.title: 12-Season vs 4-Season Colour Analysis: What's the Difference?
item.description: Confused why some sites talk about 4 colour seasons and others about 12? Here's the difference explained simply. #Colourity #PersonalColourAnalysis #IndianFashion #OutfitMatching #DesiStyle

item.title: Professional Colour Analysis vs. AI Colour Analysis: Which Should You Trust?
item.description: In-person colour consultants vs AI-powered apps — an honest comparison of cost, accuracy, and convenience. #Colourity #PersonalColourAnalysis #IndianFashion #OutfitMatching #DesiStyle

item.title: Capsule Wardrobe by Colour Season: Building a Wardrobe That Always Matches
item.description: Most capsule wardrobes fail because of colour, not quantity. Here's how to build one around your actual palette. #Colourity #PersonalColourAnalysis #IndianFashion #OutfitMatching #DesiStyle

item.title: Why Do Some Colours Make You Look Tired? The Science of Colour and Skin
item.description: It's not your imagination — the wrong colour can genuinely make you look more tired. Here's the science behind why. #Colourity #PersonalColourAnalysis #IndianFashion #OutfitMatching #DesiStyle

item.title: Which Saree Colours Suit Your Skin Tone? A Practical Guide
item.description: Choosing a saree color? Learn which shades of gold, red, pastels, and jewel tones harmonize with your warm, cool, or neutral skin undertone. #Colourity #PersonalColourAnalysis #IndianFashion #OutfitMatching #DesiStyle

item.title: Men's Sherwani and Wedding Wear Colours by Skin Tone
item.description: Groom styling made simple. A practical guide to choosing sherwani, kurta, and wedding wear colors that suit your warm or cool skin undertones. #Colourity #PersonalColourAnalysis #IndianFashion #OutfitMatching #DesiStyle

item.title: How to Color Block Your Outfits: The Indian Fashion Guide
item.description: Master the art of color blocking. Learn how to combine solid, contrasting clothing colors for a high-impact, modern ethnic look. #Colourity #PersonalColourAnalysis #IndianFashion #OutfitMatching #DesiStyle

item.title: Navratri 2026 Colour Calendar: Which Shade to Actually Wear for Your Indian Skin Tone
item.description: Navratri colour calendar 2026 with a twist — find out which shade of each day's colour actually flatters your fair, wheatish, or dusky skin tone for garba. #Colourity #PersonalColourAnalysis #IndianFashion #OutfitMatching #DesiStyle

item.title: Anarkali Colours by Skin Tone: The Complete Indian Guide (Fair to Dusky)
item.description: Find the best anarkali colours for your Indian skin tone — fair, wheatish, or dusky — with warm/cool undertone breakdowns, dupatta contrast tips, and fabric advice. #Colourity #PersonalColourAnalysis #IndianFashion #OutfitMatching #DesiStyle

item.title: Wedding Guest Outfit Colours by Skin Tone: The Indian Guide (Ethnic, Indo-Western & More)
item.description: What colour to wear as a wedding guest in India? Skin-tone-matched outfit colour guide for salwar kameez, indo-western sets, palazzo suits, and anarkalis — day vs evening. #Colourity #PersonalColourAnalysis #IndianFashion #OutfitMatching #DesiStyle

item.title: 7 Colour Rules for Indian Skin That Are Completely Wrong (And What to Wear Instead)
item.description: Stop dressing by outdated colour rules. We bust 7 common Indian skin tone colour myths — using undertone science — and tell you exactly what to wear instead. #Colourity #PersonalColourAnalysis #IndianFashion #OutfitMatching #DesiStyle

item.title: Best Outfit Colours for Men With Indian Skin Tones (Fair, Wheatish & Dusky)
item.description: What colour clothes suit Indian men? A complete guide to outfit colours for fair, wheatish, and dusky Indian men — covering t-shirts, shirts, kurtas, and ethnic wear. #Colourity #PersonalColourAnalysis #IndianFashion #OutfitMatching #DesiStyle

item.title: How to Organize Your Indian Ethnic Wardrobe by Color Palette (Step-by-Step Guide)
item.description: Learn how to organize your Indian clothes by color palette and undertone. A practical closet organization guide for sarees, kurtas, dupattas, and palazzo suits. #Colourity #PersonalColourAnalysis #IndianFashion #OutfitMatching #DesiStyle

item.title: 7 Garment Color Formulas to Mix & Match Indian Clothes You Already Own
item.description: Unlock 10+ new ethnic outfits from clothes in your existing closet. 7 color theory formulas for pairing kurtas, palazzos, sarees, and dupattas without buying new clothes. #Colourity #PersonalColourAnalysis #IndianFashion #OutfitMatching #DesiStyle

item.title: Why Certain Garment Colors Make Wheatish Skin Look Dull (And How to Fix It)
item.description: Discover why certain clothing colors make wheatish skin look dull, greyish, or washed out. Learn color mechanics, undertone clashes, and quick garment color fixes. #Colourity #PersonalColourAnalysis #IndianFashion #OutfitMatching #DesiStyle

item.title: Palazzo & Indo-Western Suit Colour Combinations for Every Indian Skin Tone
item.description: Discover the best palazzo suit color combinations matched to your skin tone. Color matching guide for wide-leg palazzos, co-ords, and Indo-Western sets. #Colourity #PersonalColourAnalysis #IndianFashion #OutfitMatching #DesiStyle

item.title: How to Pair Contrasting Kurta & Bottom Colours from Garments You Already Own
item.description: Learn how to pair contrasting kurta and bottom colors using garments in your existing closet. Master color contrast rules for separate kurtas, trousers, and skirts. #Colourity #PersonalColourAnalysis #IndianFashion #OutfitMatching #DesiStyle
